name: pm-founders
description: Founder & startup skills: Startup Idea Validator, Fundraising FAQ, Cap Table Explainer, Founder-Market Fit, Investor Cold Email, Runway Planner. Pressure-test an idea, prep for investor Q&A, explain dilution and SAFEs, articulate why-you/why-now, write outreach that gets replies, and decide when to raise. Not legal or financial advice.
